results.title: Best free effects, templates, and plugins made for DaVinci Resolve 19 | EasyEdit
excerpts:
Section Title: Best free effects, templates, and plugins made for DaVinci Resolve 19 > EasyEdit Free Templates
Content:
And now - free video templates! On the [EasyEdit Stock](https://stock.easyedit.pro/) you’ll find dozens of the latest video templates for DaVinci Resolve(and other software programs for editing) with new ones added each month.
The library includes title templates, intro templates, LUTs, transitions, overlays, and anything you can possibly use for edits. The styles also differ - while some templates are perfect for grungy content, a lot will suit lifestyle or travel vlogs, corporate promos, family events or even gaming streams.
Go check them out!

results.title: 10 DaVinci Resolve Plugins to Improve Your Video Editing
excerpts:
Section Title: 10 DaVinci Resolve Plugins to Improve Your Video Editing > **2. False Color**
Content:
DaVinci Resolve has the best color correction and color grading tools on the market, making it the perfect NLE for colorists. While DaVinci Resolve 17 introduced a native false color node, [Pixel’s False Color plugin](https://timeinpixels.com/false-color-plugin/) is still the best for false color monitoring. Like a lot of the plugins on the list, there’s also a great demo version.
What the False Color plugin does is show the exposure of a clip through the use of color. The False color plugin allows you to:
Customize your False Color ranges and export as 3D LUT
Utilize 13 high-quality and accurate presets and templates
Position the scale reference anywhere in your workspace area
Work in real-time in DaVinci Resolve
**FREE TRIAL: Yes**
**PRICE: $48**

results.title: Dehancer OFX plugins for DaVinci Resolve
excerpts:
Halation is a film emulsion effect, a red halo around light sources and specular highlights. It also makes skin tone more vivid and attractive. 8 halation profiles with custom adjustments handle most creative needs.
View Product
Dehancer Breath and Damage
Animated effects bring video to life with subtle changes between adjacent frames, like in the real film movie. Includes 3 tools: Film Breath, Gate Weave and Film Damage. Film Damage recreates emulsion artifacts like dust, hair and scratches.
View Product
FREE
Dehancer Monitor
Free tool for technical image control that provides exposure monitoring with False Colors and Clipping Indication.
